title: Course Materials
content:
Course Materials# This section is the main home for the course website. Add Markdown files under content/docs/ and Hugo Book will include them in the sidebar.
Suggested Structure# content/docs/schedule.md for the course schedule. content/docs/lectures/ for lecture notes. content/docs/practicals/ for hands-on materials. content/docs/resources.md for links and references.

title: About This Site
content:
About This Site# This repository is configured as a Hugo site using the Hugo Book theme.
When Markdown content is pushed to main, GitHub Actions builds the static site and commits the generated HTML files under public/ back to this repository. This workflow generates files only; it does not deploy through GitHub Pages.
Writing Content# Create or edit Markdown files under content/docs/. Use standard Hugo frontmatter at the top of each file:
--- title: "Lecture Title" weight: 10 ---Lower weight values appear earlier in the sidebar.
